{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Media Executive",
  "description": "Mara Cruiz Organics is a Nigerian hair care brand specializing in natural, plant-based products designed for African hair textures.&nbsp;Mara Cruiz Limited is a fast-growing, purpose-driven company committed to manufacturing high-quality, effective haircare products, delivering real results, and creating meaningful impact for our customers and community.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Media Executive
Job Location:&nbsp;Surulere, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The Media Executive is responsible for creating, managing, and executing multimedia content that supports the company&rsquo;s brand, marketing, and communication objectives.
	This role covers graphic design, video production, content editing, and visual storytelling across digital platforms.


Key Responsibilities
Content Creation:


	Design engaging graphics for social media, website, and marketing materials
	Plan, shoot, and edit high-quality videos for campaigns and promotions
	Develop creative concepts for visual storytelling


Video Production &amp; Editing:


	Handle video shoots (indoor and outdoor)
	Edit videos using professional tools (e.g., Adobe Premiere Pro, CapCut, After Effects)
	Add motion graphics, transitions, and sound effects


Brand Consistency:


	Ensure all media content aligns with brand identity and guidelines
	Maintain a consistent visual style across all platforms


Social Media Support:


	Collaborate with the marketing team to create content calendars
	Produce platform-specific content (Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, etc.)
	Optimize visuals for engagement and performance


Equipment &amp; Tools Management:


	Operate cameras, lighting, and audio equipment
	Maintain media tools and ensure proper usage


Trend Monitoring:


	Stay updated with social media and design trends
	Suggest innovative ideas to improve content performance
",
  "datePosted": "2026-03-26",
  "validThrough": "2026-04-05",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",
  "hiringOrganization": {
    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Mara Cruiz Organics"
    
  },
  "jobLocation": {
    "@type": "Place",

      "addressCountry": "NG"
     
      
    }
  },

    "value": "196513"
  },

    "@type": "MonetaryAmount",

      "minValue": 0,
      "maxValue": 0,

    }

}



Media Executive Job at Mara Cruiz Organics




        
    

        
        Mara Cruiz Organics is a Nigerian hair care brand specializing in natural, plant-based products designed for African hair textures. Mara Cruiz Limited is a fast-growing, purpose-driven company committed to manufacturing high-quality, effective haircare products, delivering real results, and creating meaningful impact for our customers and community.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Media Executive
Job Location: Surulere, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The Media Executive is responsible for creating, managing, and executing multimedia content that supports the company’s brand, marketing, and communication objectives.
	This role covers graphic design, video production, content editing, and visual storytelling across digital platforms.


Key Responsibilities
Content Creation:


	Design engaging graphics for social media, website, and marketing materials
	Plan, shoot, and edit high-quality videos for campaigns and promotions
	Develop creative concepts for visual storytelling


Video Production & Editing:


	Handle video shoots (indoor and outdoor)
	Edit videos using professional tools (e.g., Adobe Premiere Pro, CapCut, After Effects)
	Add motion graphics, transitions, and sound effects


Brand Consistency:


	Ensure all media content aligns with brand identity and guidelines
	Maintain a consistent visual style across all platforms


Social Media Support:


	Collaborate with the marketing team to create content calendars
	Produce platform-specific content (Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, etc.)
	Optimize visuals for engagement and performance


Equipment & Tools Management:


	Operate cameras, lighting, and audio equipment
	Maintain media tools and ensure proper usage


Trend Monitoring:


	Stay updated with social media and design trends
	Suggest innovative ideas to improve content performance
    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Webmaster",
  "description": "Thewill new media&nbsp;is a contemporary news organization committed to delivering timely, accurate, and insightful reporting on topics ranging from politics and business to lifestyle and entertainment. Recognized for its credibility and dedication to ethical journalism, Thewill new media serves a diverse audience with high-quality content. With an innovative approach to storytelling and digital engagement, the organization is at the forefront of modern media. Headquartered in Lagos, Thewill new media aims to inform, educate, and inspire its readers through impactful reporting and digital solutions.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Webmaster

Job Location:&nbsp;Ikeja
Employment Type: Contract

Role Description


	This is a contract hybrid role for a Webmaster based in Lagos, allowing for a combination of in-office and remote work. The Webmaster will be responsible for designing, managing, and maintaining the organization&#39;s websites to ensure optimal performance and user experience.
	Daily tasks will include website updates, troubleshooting, integrating e-commerce features, monitoring web analytics, and coordinating web-based projects.
	The role also involves collaborating with the editorial and marketing teams to ensure alignment with content and business goals.


Qualifications


	Experience with Web Design and understanding of user interface (UI) and user experience (UX) best practices
	Extensive knowledge in E-Commerce platforms and tools integration
	Strong skills in Programming languages commonly used for web development
	Proficiency in Project Management to coordinate web initiatives and meet deadlines
	Ability to analyze and report data using Web Analytics tools
	Excellent problem-solving skills and attention to detail
	Ability to work efficiently in a hybrid work environment
	Experience with content management systems (e.g., WordPress, Joomla) is a plus
	Familiarity with SEO best practices and digital marketing concepts is an advantage.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;career@thewillnews.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Webmaster Job at theWill New Media




        
    

        
        Thewill new media is a contemporary news organization committed to delivering timely, accurate, and insightful reporting on topics ranging from politics and business to lifestyle and entertainment. Recognized for its credibility and dedication to ethical journalism, Thewill new media serves a diverse audience with high-quality content. With an innovative approach to storytelling and digital engagement, the organization is at the forefront of modern media. Headquartered in Lagos, Thewill new media aims to inform, educate, and inspire its readers through impactful reporting and digital solutions.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Webmaster
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Location: Ikeja
Employment Type: Contract

Role Description


	This is a contract hybrid role for a Webmaster based in Lagos, allowing for a combination of in-office and remote work. The Webmaster will be responsible for designing, managing, and maintaining the organization's websites to ensure optimal performance and user experience.
	Daily tasks will include website updates, troubleshooting, integrating e-commerce features, monitoring web analytics, and coordinating web-based projects.
	The role also involves collaborating with the editorial and marketing teams to ensure alignment with content and business goals.


Qualifications


	Experience with Web Design and understanding of user interface (UI) and user experience (UX) best practices
	Extensive knowledge in E-Commerce platforms and tools integration
	Strong skills in Programming languages commonly used for web development
	Proficiency in Project Management to coordinate web initiatives and meet deadlines
	Ability to analyze and report data using Web Analytics tools
	Excellent problem-solving skills and attention to detail
	Ability to work efficiently in a hybrid work environment
	Experience with content management systems (e.g., WordPress, Joomla) is a plus
	Familiarity with SEO best practices and digital marketing concepts is an advantage.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Receptionist Job at Devon Pharmaceuticals Company Limited




        
    

        
        The primary business of Devon Pharmaceuticals, a foremost provider of pharmaceutical services in Nigeria spreading through Sub-Saharan Africa and beyond, is to conduct business as importers of finished pharmaceutical products and to conduct sales and marketing of such in the most ethical manner.

Our products are sourced from reputable, GMP-certified factories across the globe. We maintain proper storage facilities in Lagos and other strategic towns in the different parts of Nigeria.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Receptionist

Job Location: Sabo, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Welcoming office guests and directing them to the person or office they are visiting.
	Manage front desk operations.
	Keeping the reception tidy
	Answering all incoming generalphone calls and providing administrative support as needed.
	Handle correspondence.
	Provide information and assistance to Admin staff.
	Schedule appointments and meetings
	Maintain calenders and schedules
	Provide exceptional customer service
	Respond to client inquiries.


Requirements


	The ability to work well with others.
	Pay attention to details.
	Be able to handle any task given to him/her.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Secretary",
  "description": "Tribest is a corporate support solutions provider with a comprehensive range of people outsourcing services. We have a diversified team of management, strategy, banking and capacity development experts working together to provide organizations with the best human resource management solutions. With a team that diverse, we are setting new standards of performance and raising the bar in excellent service delivery.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Secretary

Job Location:&nbsp;Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Role Objective


	To provide high-level administrative support to the Audit and Tax teams, ensuring seamless office operations, professional client relations, and meticulous management of financial documents and correspondence.


Key Responsibilities
Document Management:


	Assist in the formatting, printing, and binding of Audit reports, financial statements, and tax letters.


Client Relations:


	Receive and direct clients, manage the office switchboard, and handle inquiries with extreme professionalism.


Filing &amp; Archiving:


	Maintain a highly organized physical and digital filing system for sensitive client records, ensuring easy retrieval for auditors.


Scheduling:


	Manage the firm&rsquo;s calendar, including scheduling client audits, tax filing deadlines, and internal partner meetings.


Correspondence:


	Draft and proofread professional letters, emails, and memos to regulatory bodies (like LIRS/FIRS) and clients.


Office Logistics:


	Monitor office supplies, manage petty cash for daily office expenses, and ensure the reception area is always presentable.


Minimum Qualifications
Education:


	
	OND / HND /&nbsp;B.Sc in Office Technology Management, Secretarial Studies, Business Administration, or any related field.
	


Experience:


	
	0 &ndash; 3 years of experience
	


Technical Skills:


	
	Proficiency in Microsoft Word(advanced formatting) and Excel.
	
	
	Strong typing speed and accuracy.
	


Soft Skills:


	Exceptional command of English (Written and Oral).
	Discretion: Ability to handle confidential financial information with integrity.
	High attention to detail (zero tolerance for typos in financial documents).


Salary
N100,000 - N150,000 per month.",

Secretary Job at Tribest Corporate Support Limited




        
    

        
        Tribest is a corporate support solutions provider with a comprehensive range of people outsourcing services. We have a diversified team of management, strategy, banking and capacity development experts working together to provide organizations with the best human resource management solutions. With a team that diverse, we are setting new standards of performance and raising the bar in excellent service delivery.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Secretary

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Role Objective
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	To provide high-level administrative support to the Audit and Tax teams, ensuring seamless office operations, professional client relations, and meticulous management of financial documents and correspondence.


Key Responsibilities
Document Management:


	Assist in the formatting, printing, and binding of Audit reports, financial statements, and tax letters.


Client Relations:


	Receive and direct clients, manage the office switchboard, and handle inquiries with extreme professionalism.


Filing & Archiving:


	Maintain a highly organized physical and digital filing system for sensitive client records, ensuring easy retrieval for auditors.


Scheduling:


	Manage the firm’s calendar, including scheduling client audits, tax filing deadlines, and internal partner meetings.


Correspondence:


	Draft and proofread professional letters, emails, and memos to regulatory bodies (like LIRS/FIRS) and clients.


Office Logistics:


	Monitor office supplies, manage petty cash for daily office expenses, and ensure the reception area is always presentable.


Minimum Qualifications
Education:


	
	OND / HND / B.Sc in Office Technology Management, Secretarial Studies, Business Administration, or any related field.
	


Experience:


	
	0 – 3 years of experience
	


Technical Skills:


	
	Proficiency in Microsoft Word(advanced formatting) and Excel.
	
	
	Strong typing speed and accuracy.
	


Soft Skills:


	Exceptional command of English (Written and Oral).
	Discretion: Ability to handle confidential financial information with integrity.
	High attention to detail (zero tolerance for typos in financial documents).


Salary
N100,000 - N150,000 per month.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Operation and Risk Manager",
  "description": "Tribest is a corporate support solutions provider with a comprehensive range of people outsourcing services. We have a diversified team of management, strategy, banking and capacity development experts working together to provide organizations with the best human resource management solutions. With a team that diverse, we are setting new standards of performance and raising the bar in excellent service delivery.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Operation and Risk Manager

Job Location:&nbsp;Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Role Overview


	The Operations &amp; Risk Manager is responsible for managing and overseeing all operational activities of the company, while embedding strong operational risk controls.
	The role combines day-to-day execution with managerial oversight to ensure efficient processes, staff supervision, documentation integrity, and compliance with internal controls.


Key Responsibilities


	Lead and manage all operational activities of the finance company
	Supervise operations staff and assign duties appropriately
	Design, implement, and enforce operational processes and workflows
	Ensure timely and accurate processing of loan documentation, disbursements, and repayments
	Maintain proper custody and control of security and loan documents &bull; Coordinate operational support for credit, treasury, and business teams
	Oversee office administration, vendors, facilities, and logistics Key Responsibilities &ndash; Operational Risk &amp; Control
	Identify, assess, and mitigate operational risks across all processes
	Develop and maintain operational policies, procedures, and checklists
	Ensure adherence to internal controls and approval limits
	Monitor compliance with operational and documentation standards
	Support internal and external audits and regulatory reviews
	Escalate control breaches, incidents, and process failures to management


Requirements
Educational Qualification:


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree or HND qualification&nbsp;in Business Administration, Accounting, Banking &amp; Finance, or related field.


Experience Requirements:


	6 - 10 years of experience in operations within a financial institution.
	At least 3 years in a supervisory or managerial role.
	Prior exposure to operational risk or control functions is an advantage.

Role Overview

	The Operations & Risk Manager is responsible for managing and overseeing all operational activities of the company, while embedding strong operational risk controls.
	The role combines day-to-day execution with managerial oversight to ensure efficient processes, staff supervision, documentation integrity, and compliance with internal controls.


Key Responsibilities


	Lead and manage all operational activities of the finance company
	Supervise operations staff and assign duties appropriately
	Design, implement, and enforce operational processes and workflows
	Ensure timely and accurate processing of loan documentation, disbursements, and repayments
	Maintain proper custody and control of security and loan documents • Coordinate operational support for credit, treasury, and business teams
	Oversee office administration, vendors, facilities, and logistics Key Responsibilities – Operational Risk & Control
	Identify, assess, and mitigate operational risks across all processes
	Develop and maintain operational policies, procedures, and checklists
	Ensure adherence to internal controls and approval limits
	Monitor compliance with operational and documentation standards
	Support internal and external audits and regulatory reviews
	Escalate control breaches, incidents, and process failures to management


Requirements
Educational Qualification:


	Bachelor’s Degree or HND qualification in Business Administration, Accounting, Banking & Finance, or related field.


Experience Requirements:


	6 - 10 years of experience in operations within a financial institution.
	At least 3 years in a supervisory or managerial role.
	Prior exposure to operational risk or control functions is an advantage.
